category_sources: Official GNU nongnu page describes Lunzip as a decompressor for lzip files.
display_name_sources: Official page title uses Lunzip - Decompressor for lzip files.
docs_sources: Official Lunzip page includes a Documentation section stating Lunzip includes a man page and README and links to the online lzip manual.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official Lunzip page provides release downloads and Savannah project page but no official source-control repository URL for Lunzip itself.
tags_sources: Official Lunzip page says it decompresses lzip format, is written in C, handles archives, and is used from command line examples.
